brief: (downstream stage: premise is pulled from the accepted idea automatically)

gen_answers.premise: Seconds after winning the World Cup, Messi is asked about Ronaldo - and his answer reframes a 20-year rivalry as brotherhood.
gen_answers.improved_premise: Seconds after winning the World Cup, Messi is asked about Ronaldo - and his answer reframes a 20-year rivalry as brotherhood.
gen_answers.desire: To be undeniably the greatest - to win the one trophy that silences every doubt.
gen_answers.improved_desire: To be undeniably the greatest - to win the one trophy that silences every doubt.
gen_answers.fear: That without it he is forever 'less than,' defined and diminished by the comparison to Ronaldo.
gen_answers.improved_fear: That without it he is forever 'less than,' defined and diminished by the comparison to Ronaldo.
gen_answers.misbelief: That greatness is a war he must win alone - he has to BEAT Ronaldo to be whole.
gen_answers.improved_misbelief: That greatness is a war he must win alone - he has to BEAT Ronaldo to be whole.
gen_answers.hook: The man who finally has everything goes silent at the one question he has dodged for twenty years.
gen_answers.improved_hook: The man who finally has everything goes silent at the one question he has dodged for twenty years.
gen_answers.setup: On the eve of the final, Messi carries the one gap on his resume and Ronaldo's shadow over it.
gen_answers.improved_setup: On the eve of the final, Messi carries the one gap on his resume and Ronaldo's shadow over it.
gen_answers.inciting_incident: He wins the World Cup - and the first question isn't about the cup, it's about Ronaldo.
gen_answers.improved_inciting_incident: He wins the World Cup - and the first question isn't about the cup, it's about Ronaldo.
gen_answers.build_up: The question won't let go; he has to confront what two decades of comparison did to him.
gen_answers.improved_build_up: The question won't let go; he has to confront what two decades of comparison did to him.
gen_answers.plot_point_1: He decides, for the first time, to answer honestly and in public rather than deflect.
gen_answers.improved_plot_point_1: He decides, for the first time, to answer honestly and in public rather than deflect.
gen_answers.pinch_point_1: The GOAT-war machine - media, camps, fans - looms; every word will be weaponized.
gen_answers.improved_pinch_point_1: The GOAT-war machine - media, camps, fans - looms; every word will be weaponized.
gen_answers.pre_midpoint: He starts to answer the expected way: the trophy proves it, the debate is settled.
gen_answers.improved_pre_midpoint: He starts to answer the expected way: the trophy proves it, the debate is settled.
gen_answers.midpoint: Mid-sentence he realizes the trophy settled nothing inside him - winning didn't free him.
gen_answers.improved_midpoint: Mid-sentence he realizes the trophy settled nothing inside him - winning didn't free him.
gen_answers.post_midpoint: He switches gears: instead of claiming victory over Ronaldo, he reaches for what Ronaldo meant.
gen_answers.improved_post_midpoint: He switches gears: instead of claiming victory over Ronaldo, he reaches for what Ronaldo meant.
gen_answers.pinch_point_2: The old narrative presses hardest - the room is primed for a winner's gloat, a final verdict.
gen_answers.improved_pinch_point_2: The old narrative presses hardest - the room is primed for a winner's gloat, a final verdict.
gen_answers.supposed_victory: He feels he can land a clean line that honors both and ends the debate for good.
gen_answers.improved_supposed_victory: He feels he can land a clean line that honors both and ends the debate for good.
gen_answers.disaster: The line starts to come out as just another comparison - the misbelief he swore off - and he falters.
gen_answers.improved_disaster: The line starts to come out as just another comparison - the misbelief he swore off - and he falters.
gen_answers.dark_moment: Silence. His fear floods back: maybe he is only the rivalry, maybe no answer escapes the comparison.
gen_answers.improved_dark_moment: Silence. His fear floods back: maybe he is only the rivalry, maybe no answer escapes the comparison.
gen_answers.recovery: He drops the misbelief: greatness was never a solo war - Ronaldo pushed him into who he became.
gen_answers.improved_recovery: He drops the misbelief: greatness was never a solo war - Ronaldo pushed him into who he became.
gen_answers.climactic_confrontation: He faces the question fully, no deflection, no gloat - he says the true thing.
gen_answers.improved_climactic_confrontation: He faces the question fully, no deflection, no gloat - he says the true thing.
gen_answers.victory: 'We carried each other for twenty years.' The room goes silent, then the meaning lands.
gen_answers.improved_victory: 'We carried each other for twenty years.' The room goes silent, then the meaning lands.
gen_answers.resolution: The frame shifts from rivalry to brotherhood; both are great because of each other.
gen_answers.improved_resolution: The frame shifts from rivalry to brotherhood; both are great because of each other.

eval_answers.why: Engine is clear, but the arc link is loose, the midpoint is a soft pivot, and the disaster doesn't fully blindside.
Arc and disaster much tighter; the midpoint still reads as a pivot, not a true reversal.
Midpoint now genuinely inverts the goal; push the engine and arc the last notch.
Engine locked, arc closes hard, midpoint reverses, disaster blindsides - advance.
Confirmed: the misbelief is the spine and Recovery pays it off.
